# b2b-saas-lightdash — LLM Entry Point

## Read First
1. CLAUDE.md — project rules and non-negotiables
2. AGENTS.md — module layout and TDD requirements
3. decisions.md — architecture decisions

## What This Does
Lightdash BI layer on top of b2b-saas-dbt — dashboards, semantic exposure, agent-ready MCP surface
